description: Letter from Yeshuʿab. Avraham ha-Kohen, the cantor of Shubrā Damsis to his maternal uncles, sons of Moshe ha-Kohen, perhaps in Fuwwa. With introductory citations, such as Ecclesiastes 8:4. Opens with condolences upon the death of a woman. On verso, the address is written both in Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
